description_long: This is a medium-sized loaf of bread with a slightly domed top and a rustic, uneven crust. The crust is golden brown with darker toasted areas and a rough, craggy texture, featuring some visible cheese or topping baked into the surface. The sides of the loaf are lighter in color, transitioning from a pale beige at the base to a deeper brown at the top. The bread appears to be unsliced and has a dense, solid form, typical of artisanal or bakery-style loaves. The bottom is relatively flat, suggesting it was baked directly on a surface. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A rustic, unsliced loaf of bread with a golden-brown, textured crust and visible baked-in toppings. The loaf has a domed top and a pale, flat base.
description_view_0: The loaf is seen from the side, showing its domed top, rough crust, and pale, flat base.
description_view_1: The loaf is viewed from one end, highlighting the rounded, uneven end and the textured crust with visible toppings.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, displays the domed top and rough crust, with a slightly different pattern of browning.
description_view_3: The other end view, showing a more pronounced browning and a denser appearance of toppings on the crust.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rustic, uneven texture with a golden-brown color and darker toasted spots. There are visible baked-in cheese shreds and a rough, craggy surface, giving it an artisanal appearance.
